channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: EU agrees to implement US trade pact

Importance: 73.9 | Covered by: 7 feeds | Reputation: 7.8

Matched titles:
- EU strikes provisional agreement to finalise US trade deal
- EU agrees to implement US trade pact after Trump threats

- EU approves US tariff deal after intense internal debate to avoid trade clash
- EU agrees to implement US trade pact after Trump threats
- EU paves way to finalise US trade deal
- Under Trump pressure, EU agrees to implement US trade pact
- Under Trump pressure, EU agrees to implement US trade pact
- Under Trump pressure, EU agrees to implement US trade pact
